Season the filet thoroughly with the Steak Seasoning
Cook over hot part of grill, turning every 1-2 minutes, until a nice crust is created on both sides
Transfer to oven to finish cooking to desired temperature
Season the asparagus with oil, salt, and pepper
Cut the asparagus on a bias in half (4 pieces); cut Filet into 8 pieces.
On the Filet Plate, line with seared cedar wood paper in the middle and steak just off center
Opposite side of the steak stagger the asparagus spears off one another on one corner
Cover the filet with shallot marmalade, then top with butter coin.  Melt butter coin with blowtorch
Cover butter with crispy onions and chives
